<!-- Describe the problem you're experiencing or the gap you've noticed -->

<!-- A clear description of what you want to happen -->

## Who would benefit from this?
<!-- e.g. streamers with large multilingual audiences, viewers who speak minority languages -->

## Any alternatives you've considered?
<!-- Have you tried working around this in another way? -->

## Additional context
<!-- Screenshots, examples, or anything else that helps explain the request -->
